content_body: Welcome to Blue Ridge Distillery! Located at 116 West Main Street in Blue Ridge, Georgia, they are proud to serve Georgia-made Peach Brandy, Apple Brandy, Pineapple Rum, and much more. So stop in and get a taste of the North Georgia Mountains! You can also visit their second location in Ellijay at White Path Creek Distillery.
title: Blue Ridge Distillery
